user_input.Idea Description:
Idea Description: Conventional camera and drone-based surveillance setups produce enormous video data but lack intelligence, depending heavily on human staff for continuous observation. This project proposes integrating AI-driven video analytics that can automatically detect unusual activities, track objects, and send alerts in real time, minimizing manual effort and improving situational awareness.

Potential Challenges: Data Volume and Processing Speed: Handling continuous, high-resolution video data from multiple sources in real time. Model Accuracy: Avoiding false positives/negatives in detecting suspicious activities. Hardware Requirements: High computational power needed for edge or cloud-based video analytics. Privacy and Legal Concerns: Managing data storage, privacy compliance (GDPR-like regulations), and secure handling of sensitive footage. Environmental Variations: Ensuring the model performs consistently under different lighting, weather, and crowd conditions.
